final:
module RefModule(
  input clk,
  input [7:0] data_in,
  output reg [7:0] data_out,
  output reg [7:0] data_out_inv
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    data_out <= data_in;
  end

  always @(negedge clk) begin
    data_out_inv <= ~data_in;
  end

endmodule
